title: BlackRock (BLK) Intrinsic Value — Gemini 3.1 DCF Analysis
description: Intrinsic value analysis of BlackRock using a discounted cash flow (DCF) model and sensitivity analysis.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 23.4% - Exceptionally strong growth aided by market appreciation and massive net inflows into ETFs and private markets.
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: 2.5% - Assuming steady long-term growth as the dominant global asset manager.
assumptions.discountRate: 9.8% - WACC reflecting a somewhat elevated beta (1.487) typical of asset managers heavily tied to market performance.
